{"dialect":"","category":"gen: mismatch","sql":"SELECT FOO(x /* c */) /* FOO */, b /* b */"}
{"dialect":"","category":"parse: Invalid expression / Unexpected token","sql":"SELECT (LEAD(foo1, 1, 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY foo2 ORDER BY foo3) FROM t"}
{"dialect":"mysql","category":"gen: mismatch","sql":"'\\\\\"a'"}
{"dialect":"mysql","category":"parse: Invalid expression / Unexpected token","sql":"@@GLOBAL.max_connections"}
{"dialect":"mysql","category":"parse: Invalid expression / Unexpected token","sql":"SELECT * FROM x ORDER BY BINARY a"}
{"dialect":"mysql","category":"parse: Invalid expression / Unexpected token","sql":"SELECT @var1 := 1, @var2"}
{"dialect":"mysql","category":"parse: Invalid expression / Unexpected token","sql":"SELECT @var1 := COUNT(*) FROM t1"}
{"dialect":"mysql","category":"parse: Invalid expression / Unexpected token","sql":"SELECT @var1, @var2 := @var1"}
{"dialect":"mysql","category":"parse: Invalid expression / Unexpected token","sql":"SELECT CHARSET(CHAR(100 USING utf8))"}
{"dialect":"mysql","category":"parse: Required keyword","sql":"SELECT CHAR(0xC3A9 USING `utf8mb4`)"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"gen: cast/type","sql":"SELECT DATE_PART('isodow'::varchar(6), current_date)"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"parse: Expected AS after CAST","sql":"SELECT CAST(e'\\176' AS BYTEA)"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"parse: Expecting )","sql":"SELECT 1 FROM ((VALUES (1)) AS vals(id) LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl ON vals.id = tbl.id)"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"parse: Expecting )","sql":"SELECT p1.id, p2.id, v1, v2 FROM polygons AS p1, polygons AS p2, LATERAL VERTICES(p1.poly) v1, LATERAL VERTICES(p2.poly) v2 WHERE (v1 <-> v2) < 10 AND p1.id <> p2.id"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"parse: Invalid expression / Unexpected token","sql":"'x' 'y' 'z'"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"parse: Invalid expression / Unexpected token","sql":"SELECT a <<->> b"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"parse: Invalid expression / Unexpected token","sql":"SELECT e'\\n'"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"parse: Invalid expression / Unexpected token","sql":"SELECT e'\\t'"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"parse: Invalid expression / Unexpected token","sql":"SELECT e'\\xDEADBEEF'"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"parse: Invalid expression / Unexpected token","sql":"SELECT e'foo \\' bar'"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"parse: Invalid expression / Unexpected token","sql":"SELECT e'update table_name set a = \\'foo\\' where 1 = 0' AS x FROM tab"}

{"dialect":"postgres","category":"parse: Required keyword","sql":"SELECT * FROM foo WHERE id = %s"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"parse: Required keyword","sql":"SELECT MLEAST(VARIADIC ARRAY[]::numeric[])"}
